what_is_bazi_p1: BaZi (Four Pillars) is based on the Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches of the year, month, day, and hour at birth, combined with solar terms and true solar time.
what_is_bazi_p2: The system converts overseas birth time to China time zone, then to lunar calendar, and finally uses the capital city’s true solar time to produce accurate BaZi.
intro: Enter your birth info; the system uses true solar time for professional charting.
birth_city_placeholder: Enter city name (optional; default uses capital’s solar time)
login_hint: Login to save your chart history.
body_strong_desc: Day Master is in season, strong energy, decisive but needs to avoid being too self-centered.
body_strong_career: Suitable for leadership roles, management, entrepreneurship, military/police, sports, etc.
body_strong_daily: Exercise to release excess energy, learn to listen, practice meditation.
body_strong_caution: Avoid arrogance and conflicts, be careful of physical injuries, do not expand blindly.
body_weak_desc: Day Master is out of season, weaker energy, good at cooperation but may lack independence.
body_weak_career: Suitable for teamwork, support roles, planning, research, technical support, etc.
body_weak_daily: Read and learn, make good friends, keep regular hours, strengthen physical health.
body_weak_caution: Avoid overexertion, do not take high risks alone, beware of petty people.
shensha_tianyi_desc: The most auspicious star, turns danger into safety, help from noble people.
shensha_yima_desc: Represents travel, movement, migration. Indicates changes in job or residence.
shensha_taohua_desc: Represents romance, charm, social relations. Good for social/arts, but beware of scandals.
personality_wood_trait: Kind, upright, progressive, growing like a tree.
personality_fire_trait: Passionate, polite, impatient, warm like fire.
personality_earth_trait: Honest, steady, tolerant, grounding like earth.
personality_metal_trait: Righteous, decisive, tough, sharp like metal.
personality_water_trait: Wise, flexible, changeable, flowing like water.
advice_supplement_wood: Lack Wood: Contact nature, wear green, live near plants. Jobs: Education, Forestry, Furniture.
advice_supplement_fire: Lack Fire: Sunbathe, wear red, live in sunny places. Jobs: Energy, Food, Arts.
advice_supplement_earth: Lack Earth: Contact soil, wear yellow, live in stable places. Jobs: Real Estate, Construction.
advice_supplement_metal: Lack Metal: Wear metal jewelry, wear white. Jobs: Finance, Machinery, Jewelry.
advice_supplement_water: Lack Water: Near water, wear black/blue. Jobs: Logistics, Trade, Marine.
advice_control_wood: Excess Wood: Use Metal to prune or Fire to release. Avoid stubborness.
advice_control_fire: Excess Fire: Use Water to control or Earth to release. Control emotions.
advice_control_earth: Excess Earth: Use Wood to loosen or Metal to release. Exercise more.
advice_control_metal: Excess Metal: Use Fire to forge or Water to release. Be compassionate.
advice_control_water: Excess Water: Use Earth to dam or Wood to release. Be grounded.
dayun_bijian_desc: Strong self-awareness, desire for independence. Competition or partnership.
dayun_jiecai_desc: More social activities, high expenses. Possible loss through friends.
dayun_shishen_desc: Talented, happy, good food. Good for learning, maybe lazy.
dayun_shishen_advice: Use talents; don't be too lazy.
dayun_shangguan_desc: Quick mind, rebellious. Good for innovation, bad for authority.
dayun_zhengcai_desc: Stable income, focus on reality. Good for marriage (men).
dayun_piancai_desc: Fluctuating wealth, opportunities. Generous and social.
dayun_qisha_desc: High pressure, challenges, power. Solve problems.
dayun_zhengyin_desc: Learning, degree, noble help. Peaceful mind.
dayun_zhengyin_advice: Learn hard; don't rely on others.
yongshen_wood_career: Wood related: Furniture, Paper, Education, Medicine.
yongshen_fire_career: Fire related: Energy, Food, Arts, Electronics.
yongshen_fire_relationship: Partner: Warm, red face. Snake/Horse/Fire strong.
yongshen_earth_career: Earth related: Real Estate, Construction, Agriculture.
yongshen_metal_career: Metal related: Finance, Machinery, Jewelry, Law.
yongshen_metal_relationship: Partner: Fair skin, tough. Monkey/Rooster/Metal strong.
yongshen_water_career: Water related: Logistics, Trade, Marine, Tourism.
yongshen_water_relationship: Partner: Smart, round face. Pig/Rat/Water strong.
shensha_taiji_desc: Spiritual, mysterious, good fortune in later life.
shensha_tiande_desc: Star of mitigation, indicates kindness and deep blessings.
shensha_yuede_desc: Star of hidden merit, turns danger into safety, harmonious relationships.
shensha_wenchang_desc: Intelligence, literary talent, good for studies and creation.
shensha_huagai_desc: Artistic talent, religious tendency, prone to loneliness.
shensha_yangren_desc: Strong will, decisive, impulsive, risk of injury.
shensha_kuigang_desc: Strong character, decisive, authoritative, risk of conflict.
shensha_guasu_desc: Loneliness, weak affinity with opposite sex.
compatibility_desc: Enter the second person's birth info for compatibility analysis
ai_load_fail: AI analysis failed to load, please try again
share_card_fail: Share card generation failed, please try again
pdf_export_fail: PDF export failed, please try again
compatibility_short_desc: Analyze destiny compatibility between two people
ai_fallback: AI analysis requires DeepSeek API key. Set DEEPSEEK_API_KEY environment variable to enable.
ai_intro_desc: Powered by DeepSeek AI, combined with thousands of years of BaZi wisdom, delivering your personalized in-depth analysis
ai_intro_feature1_desc: Analyze your Day Master traits, Five Element tendencies, and inner personality
ai_intro_feature2_desc: Yong Shen based career direction and wealth management advice
ai_intro_feature3_desc: Decode relationship patterns and marriage fortune in your chart
ai_intro_feature4_desc: Five Element balance based health tips and remedies
personality_preview_earth: Reliable & steady, loyal, great at maintaining
liunian_note: The following is a yearly trend analysis based on your chart structure.
verify_p1: This system uses true solar time at birth location.
verify_p2: If birth time is unknown, the Hour Pillar is excluded.
verify_p3: Solar term transitions are calculated at exact times.
disclaimer_p1: This analysis is for cultural and entertainment purposes only.
disclaimer_p2: Results are for personal reference only.
disclaimer_p3: Do not use for medical, legal, or financial decisions.
wuxing_explain_p1: The Five Elements (Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water) describe the nature and interactions of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches.
wuxing_explain_p2: Wood feeds Fire, Fire creates Earth, Earth bears Metal, Metal carries Water, Water nourishes Wood.
yongshen_explain_p1: Yong Shen is the preferred element to balance your chart. It emphasizes your ideal energy direction.
yongshen_explain_p2: When the chart is strong, the Yong Shen tends toward draining elements; when weak, toward supporting elements.
dayun_explain_p1: Luck Pillars run in 10-year phases starting from your birth.
dayun_explain_p2: Each Luck Pillar carries a Stem-Branch theme representing energy shifts.
dayun_explain_p3: Explanations use everyday language and avoid absolute statements.
wx_wood_personality: Wood people are kind, upright, and ambitious. Creative and principled.
wx_wood_career: Education, culture, design, forestry, home furnishing, fashion, publishing, medicine.
wx_wood_health: Wood governs liver and eyes. Maintain emotional balance, sleep well, exercise.
wx_wood_advice: Connect with nature and cultivate kindness, but avoid being too rigid.
wx_fire_personality: Fire people are passionate, polite, and energetic. Strong action and expression.
wx_fire_career: Energy, food service, entertainment, beauty, advertising, electronics, internet.
wx_fire_health: Fire governs heart and blood. Control emotions, avoid overexcitement.
wx_fire_advice: Stay passionate and positive, but learn to control temper and emotions.
wx_earth_personality: Earth people are honest, steady, and tolerant. Reliable and loyal.
wx_earth_career: Real estate, construction, agriculture, warehousing, antiques, management.
wx_earth_health: Earth governs spleen and stomach. Eat regularly, avoid overeating.
wx_earth_advice: Stay grounded and steady, but avoid stagnation. Learn new things.
wx_metal_personality: Metal people are righteous, decisive, and firm. Strong execution and principles.
wx_metal_career: Finance, hardware, machinery, automotive, jewelry, law, military, auditing.
wx_metal_health: Metal governs lungs and bones. Protect respiratory system, avoid cold.
wx_metal_advice: Stay decisive and principled, but cultivate compassion. Avoid being too rigid.
wx_water_personality: Water people are wise, flexible, and adaptable. Smart and sociable.
wx_water_career: Logistics, transportation, trade, aquaculture, tourism, media, consulting.
wx_water_health: Water governs kidneys and urinary system. Stay warm, sleep well.
wx_water_advice: Stay wise and flexible, but avoid being too slippery. Build stability.
wx_analysis_strong_fire_weak_wood: Fire is the strongest element, making you passionate and expressive. Wood is the weakest, suggesting room for growth in creativity and planning.
advice_career_wood_strong: Suited for education, culture, design. Strong Wood means leadership roles.
advice_career_wood_weak: Suited for education, culture, design. Weaker Wood suits support roles.
advice_career_fire_strong: Suited for energy, entertainment, internet. Strong Fire suits creative roles.
advice_career_fire_weak: Suited for energy, entertainment, internet. Weaker Fire suits behind-the-scenes work.
advice_career_earth_strong: Suited for real estate, construction, management. Strong Earth suits management.
advice_career_earth_weak: Suited for real estate, construction, management. Weaker Earth suits execution roles.
advice_career_metal_strong: Suited for finance, law, auditing. Strong Metal suits management.
advice_career_metal_weak: Suited for finance, law, auditing. Weaker Metal suits technical roles.
advice_career_water_strong: Suited for logistics, trade, media. Strong Water suits diplomatic roles.
advice_career_water_weak: Suited for logistics, trade, media. Weaker Water suits research roles.
advice_career_default: Choose a career based on your strengths.
advice_wealth_wood: Wealth is linked to networks and growth. Focus on long-term investment.
advice_wealth_fire: Wealth is linked to expression and social skills. Earn with your talents.
advice_wealth_earth: Wealth is stable. Focus on long-term investment and real estate.
advice_wealth_metal: Wealth is linked to judgment. Focus on investment and finance.
advice_wealth_water: Wealth is flexible. Suited for trade and logistics industries.
advice_wealth_default: Maintain stable income and invest carefully.
advice_love_wood: Proactive in love but sometimes too stubborn. Learn to be flexible.
advice_love_fire: Passionate in love but emotional. Learn to stay calm and tolerant.
advice_love_earth: Stable in love but sometimes unromantic. Learn to express affection.
advice_love_metal: Rational in love but not expressive. Learn to be gentle.
advice_love_water: Flexible in love but sometimes unfaithful. Learn to be stable.
advice_love_default: Cherish those around you and nurture your relationships.
advice_health_wood: Watch liver and eye health. Stay emotionally balanced and exercise.
advice_health_fire: Watch heart and blood health. Control emotions and maintain regular sleep.
advice_health_earth: Watch digestive health. Eat regularly and avoid overeating.
advice_health_metal: Watch respiratory health. Avoid cold and breathe fresh air.
advice_health_water: Watch kidney health. Stay warm and avoid staying up late.
advice_health_default: Maintain regular routines, exercise, and periodic checkups.
advice_study_wood: Suited for culture, education, design — creative subjects.
advice_study_fire: Suited for media, arts, internet — expressive subjects.
advice_study_earth: Suited for management, finance, construction — stable subjects.
advice_study_metal: Suited for finance, law, engineering — logical subjects.
advice_study_water: Suited for languages, trade, media — flexible subjects.
advice_study_default: Find your interests and keep learning.
advice_social_wood: Sincere in socializing but sometimes too direct. Learn diplomacy.
advice_social_fire: Warm and popular in socializing. Stay humble.
advice_social_earth: Steady and trustworthy in socializing. Be more proactive.
advice_social_metal: Rational in socializing. Learn to care for others.
advice_social_water: Flexible and adaptable in socializing. Stay genuine.
advice_social_default: Be sincere and kind, and interact with others.
advice_social_taohua: Strong romantic charm. Be careful to distinguish genuine feelings.
advice_social_tianyi: Noble people often help you. Cherish your benefactors.
advice_overall_strong_default: Your Day Master is strong. Take initiative and lead. Your destiny is in your own hands.
advice_overall_strong_stars_good: Your Day Master is strong with auspicious stars. Noble people will help you throughout life.
advice_overall_strong_stars_bad: Your Day Master is strong, but watch for risks from inauspicious stars.
advice_overall_strong_stars_mixed: Your Day Master is strong. Auspicious stars bring help, but watch for risks.
advice_overall_weak_default: Your Day Master is weak. Rely on teamwork and support. Your destiny is in your own hands.
advice_overall_weak_stars_good: Your Day Master is weak, but auspicious stars bring noble helpers.
advice_overall_weak_stars_bad: Your Day Master is weak. Watch for risks from inauspicious stars.
advice_overall_weak_stars_mixed: Your Day Master is weak. Stars bring both help and risk.
shensha_tianyi_summary: Most auspicious star. Noble people help you through difficulties.
shensha_tianyi_detail: Nobleman is the most important star in BaZi. Those with Nobleman often receive help from important people. In Year Pillar: ancestral protection. In Month Pillar: career help. In Day Pillar: capable spouse. In Hour Pillar: successful children.
shensha_tianyi_career: Sales, PR, management, consulting — roles needing networks.
shensha_tianyi_health: Generally good health with Nobleman protection.
shensha_tianyi_relationship: Good romance luck. Capable spouse. Noble help in marriage.
shensha_tianyi_advice: Cherish noble helpers. Become a noble helper to others.
shensha_yima_detail: Traveling Horse indicates frequent movement and change. In Year Pillar: early migration. In Month Pillar: job changes. In Day Pillar: spouse fromfar away. In Hour Pillar: children travel far.
shensha_yima_career: Trade, transport, tourism, journalism, sales, diplomacy.
shensha_yima_health: Watch health during travels. Safety and diet.
shensha_yima_relationship: Possible long-distance relationship or foreign spouse.
shensha_yima_advice: Embrace change. Turn movement into opportunity.
shensha_taohua_detail: Peach Blossom indicates charm and social ability. In Year Pillar: early romance. In Month Pillar: workplace popularity. In Day Pillar: attractive spouse. In Hour Pillar: children have romance luck.
shensha_taohua_career: Entertainment, beauty, PR, social, service industry.
shensha_taohua_health: Enjoyment star. Avoid excess. Maintain regular life.
shensha_taohua_relationship: Very strong opposite-sex attraction. Rich love life.
shensha_taohua_advice: Use charm wisely. Don't get caught up in love games.
shensha_wenchang_detail: Academic Star indicates intelligence and literary talent. Good for exams, promotions, and certifications. In Year Pillar: scholarly family. In Month Pillar: academic excellence. In Day Pillar: cultured spouse. In Hour Pillar: smart children.
shensha_wenchang_health: Rest your brain. Prevent neurasthenia and eye strain.
shensha_wenchang_advice: Study hard. Take exams. Academic stars help.
shensha_jiangxing_detail: General Star indicates authority and leadership. Good for management positions. In Year Pillar: inherited authority. In Month Pillar: career power. In Day Pillar: authoritative spouse. In Hour Pillar: leadership children.
shensha_jiangxing_health: Overwork risk. Balance work and rest.
shensha_jiangxing_relationship: Strong-willed in love. May seem dominant.
shensha_huagai_summary: Artistic talent, religious tendency, prone to loneliness.
shensha_huagai_detail: Elegant Seal indicates artistic talent and unique thinking. Prone to loneliness. In Year Pillar: artistic family. In Month Pillar: creative work. In Day Pillar: unique spouse. In Hour Pillar: artistic children.
shensha_huagai_career: Art, design, religion, philosophy, research, counseling.
shensha_huagai_relationship: High standards in love. May marry late.
shensha_huagai_advice: Develop artistic talent. Don't be too isolated.
shensha_yangren_summary: Strong will, decisive, impulsive, risk of injury.
shensha_yangren_detail: Goat Blade is the strongest star, indicating fierce will and impulsiveness. Risk of injury. In Year Pillar: strong ancestors. In Month Pillar: competitive work. In Day Pillar: strong-willed spouse. In Hour Pillar: temperamental children.
shensha_yangren_career: Military, law, surgery, metalwork — roles needing decisiveness.
shensha_yangren_health: Risk of injury. Avoid dangerous activities.
shensha_yangren_relationship: Fierce temper in relationships. Learn gentleness.
shensha_yangren_advice: Control impulses. Turn fierceness into resilience.
shensha_lushen_detail: Prosperity Star indicates stable income and material comfort. In Year Pillar: family wealth. In Month Pillar: stable salary. In Day Pillar: wealthy spouse. In Hour Pillar: financially securelater years.
shensha_lushen_career: Civil service, teaching, accounting, banking — stable income.
shensha_lushen_health: Comfortable life. Don't be too sedentary.
shensha_lushen_relationship: Financial stability helps love. Don't equate money with love.
shensha_hongluan_detail: Red Phoenix indicates marriage and romance. In Year Pillar: early romance. In Month Pillar: workplace romance. In Day Pillar: spouse met during Red Phoenix activation. In Hour Pillar: children marry happily.
shensha_hongluan_advice: Seize Red Phoenix years for romance.
shensha_tianxi_detail: Heavenly Happiness brings joy and dispels disaster. In Year Pillar: family celebrations. In Month Pillar: career success. In Day Pillar: happy marriage. In Hour Pillar: successful children.
shensha_tianxi_career: Service industry, entertainment, education — roles bringing joy.
shensha_jinyu_detail: Golden Carriage indicates wealth and luxury. In Year Pillar: ancestral wealth. In Month Pillar: high income. In Day Pillar: wealthy spouse. In Hour Pillar: prosperous children.
shensha_jinyu_career: Luxury services, finance, investment — high-income industries.
shensha_jinyu_advice: Use material wealth wisely. Seek spiritual growth.
shensha_kuigang_summary: Strong character, decisive, authoritative, risk of conflict.
shensha_kuigang_detail: Fui Kong is a special formation indicating strong character and decisiveness. Risk of conflict if afflicted. Good for military, legal, or executive roles.
shensha_kuigang_career: Military, judiciary, executive, surgery — decisive roles.
shensha_kuigang_relationship: Fierce personality causes conflicts. Be softer.
shensha_guchen_detail: Solitary Star indicates loneliness and wandering. In Year Pillar: early separation from family. In Month Pillar: working alone. In Day Pillar: distant spouse. In Hour Pillar: lonelylater years.
shensha_guchen_career: Research, writing, programming, art — independent work.
shensha_guchen_health: Loneliness affects mental health. Stay social.
shensha_guchen_relationship: Passive in love. May miss opportunities.
shensha_guchen_advice: Socialize more. Develop hobbies. Don't isolate.
shensha_guasu_summary: Loneliness, weak affinity with opposite sex.
shensha_guasu_detail: Widow Star indicates loneliness and weak opposite-sex affinity. In Year Pillar: lacking love in childhood. In Month Pillar: cold workplace relationships. In Day Pillar: distant spouse. In Hour Pillar: lonelylater years.
shensha_guasu_health: Loneliness affects mental health. Stay positive.
shensha_guasu_relationship: Weak romance luck. Must be proactive.
shensha_guasu_advice: Be proactive in love. Don't fear rejection.
shensha_jiesha_detail: Robbery Star indicates wealth loss and conflict. In Year Pillar: ancestral loss. In Month Pillar: workplace disputes. In Day Pillar: spouse causes financial loss. In Hour Pillar: wasteful children.
shensha_jiesha_career: Avoid high-risk investment. Stable income industries.
shensha_jiesha_advice: Be financially careful. Don't trust blindly.
shensha_zaisha_detail: Disaster Star indicates accidents and sudden misfortune. In Year Pillar: ancestral disaster. In Month Pillar: workplace accidents. In Day Pillar: spouse faces misfortune. In Hour Pillar: children safety issues.
shensha_wangshen_detail: Death God indicates anxiety and disputes. In Year Pillar: early restlessness. In Month Pillar: workplace conflicts. In Day Pillar: tense spouse relationship. In Hour Pillar: worrisome children.
shensha_wangshen_career: Strategy, consulting, research — roles needing wisdom.
shensha_wangshen_relationship: Prone to arguments with partner. Communicate more.
shensha_wangshen_advice: Stay calm. Don't let external disturbances bother you.
shensha_tiande_summary: Star of mitigation, indicates kindness and deep blessings.
shensha_tiande_detail: Heavenly Virtue turns misfortune into blessing. Indicates kindness and deep fortune. In Year Pillar: ancestral virtue. In Month Pillar: personal virtue. In Day Pillar: virtuous spouse. In Hour Pillar: blessed children.
shensha_yuede_summary: Star of hidden merit, turns danger into safety.
shensha_yuede_detail: Monthly Virtue is a hidden merit star. In Year Pillar: ancestral hidden virtue. In Month Pillar: personal hidden virtue. In Day Pillar: spouse helps secretly. In Hour Pillar: blessed children.
shensha_xuetang_detail: Academic Hall indicates intelligence and scholarly success. In Year Pillar: scholarly family. In Month Pillar: academic excellence. In Day Pillar: educated spouse. In Hour Pillar: studious children.
shensha_xuetang_advice: Read and study. Use your scholarly talent.
shensha_taiji_summary: Spiritual, mysterious, good fortune in later life.
shensha_taiji_detail: Taiji Noble indicates spiritual interests and mysterious culture affinity. In Year Pillar: spiritual ancestors. In Month Pillar: interest in metaphysics. In Day Pillar: spiritual spouse. In Hour Pillar: spiritual children.
shensha_tianyimed_detail: Heavenly Doctor indicates medical affinity. In Year Pillar: medical family background. In Month Pillar: health-related career. In Day Pillar: health-conscious spouse. In Hour Pillar: health-focused children.
shensha_tianyimed_advice: Help others with health. Stay healthy.
shensha_no_shensha_summary: No prominent symbolic stars in your chart. Focus on your own efforts and choices.
shensha_has_summary: Your chart contains the following symbolic stars:
personality_analysis_strong: Yang Day Master — outgoing and proactive personality. Strong body means abundant personal energy and decisiveness.
personality_analysis_weak: Yang Day Master — outgoing and proactive personality. Weak body means lower personal energy; leverage teamwork.
personality_analysis_yin_strong: Yin Day Master — reserved and observant personality. Strong body means abundant personal energy.
personality_analysis_yin_weak: Yin Day Master — reserved and observant personality. Weak body means lower personal energy.
shishen_bijian_meaning: Same element and polarity as Day Master. Represents self, independence, competition.
shishen_bijian_personality: Independent, confident, assertive. Values own decisions. Honest and loyal.
shishen_jiecai_meaning: Same element, opposite polarity. Represents rivalry, spending, impulsiveness.
shishen_jiecai_personality: Generous, bold, adventurous. Strong social skills but impulsive spending.
shishen_shishen_meaning: Same polarity as Day Master, produced by it. Represents talent, enjoyment.
shishen_shishen_personality: Gentle, optimistic, talented. Enjoys life. Creative.
shishen_shangguan_meaning: Opposite polarity, produced by Day Master. Represents innovation, rebellion.
shishen_shangguan_personality: Sharp-minded, rebellious, innovative. Prone to controversy.
shishen_zhengcai_meaning: Controlled by Day Master, opposite polarity. Represents stable income, wife (male chart).
shishen_zhengcai_personality: Practical, realistic, values stability. Good at financial management.
shishen_piancai_meaning: Controlled by Day Master, same polarity. Represents windfall, father, socializing.
shishen_piancai_personality: Cheerful, generous, sociable. Good investment sense.
shishen_zhengguan_meaning: Controls Day Master, opposite polarity. Represents authority, status, husband (female chart).
shishen_qisha_meaning: Controls Day Master, same polarity. Represents pressure, challenge, power.
shishen_qisha_personality: Decisive, bold, challenges authority. High pressure.
shishen_zhengyin_meaning: Supports Day Master, opposite polarity. Represents learning, noble help, protection.
shishen_zhengyin_personality: Kind, studious, receives help from noble people. Peaceful.
shishen_pianyin_meaning: Supports Day Master, same polarity. Represents unique thinking, solitude.
shishen_pianyin_personality: Unique thinking, sharp intuition. May be solitary.
shishen_summary_bijian: Friend Yang Day Master — outgoing and proactive personali
shishen_summary_balanced: The Ten Gods are evenly distributed.
fortune_sum_bijian_excellent: Great day for collaboration and socializing.
fortune_sum_shishen_excellent: Happy mood, great for creativity and learning.
fortune_sum_shangguan_excellent: Full of ideas, great for innovation.
fortune_sum_zhengguan_excellent: Career luck is high, good for promotions.
fortune_sum_qisha_excellent: Challenges today but you can overcome them.
fortune_sum_zhengyin_excellent: Noble help is strong, good for studying.
fortune_sum_default_excellent: Excellent fortune today, seize the opportunity.
fortune_sum_default_neutral: Steady day, keep to your routine.
err_invalid_country: Please select a valid birth country
err_invalid_date: Please enter a valid birth date (YYYY-MM-DD)
err_invalid_time: Please enter a valid birth time (HH:MM)
err_invalid_name: Name can only contain CJK characters, letters, or numbers
onboard_step1_desc: BaZi (Four Pillars) is a traditional Chinese destiny analysis system based on the Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches of your birth year, month, day, and hour. This system uses astronomical algorithms to precisely calculate solar term transitions for accurate charting.
onboard_step2_desc: Required: Birth country, birth date, gender. Optional: Birth city (improves accuracy), birth time (if unknown, Hour Pillar is excluded). The system automatically converts your birth time to true solar time.
onboard_step3_desc: After charting, you can view Four Pillars, Five Elements distribution, Divine Stars, personality analysis, Luck Pillars, and yearly fortune. AI-powered deep interpretation is also available.
onboard_step4_desc: Your data is fully protected: all communications are encrypted, passwords are irreversibly hashed, and the system automatically defends against SQL injection, XSS attacks, and brute-force attempts. Login persists for 30 days.
onboard_step5_desc: After logging in, you can mark any chart as 'My BaZi' from history. Your personal BaZi will always be displayed on the homepage for quick access.
onboard_step6_desc: The result page provides the author's WeChat and LINE QR codes. For personalized one-on-one BaZi consultation, add the author as a friend (paid service).
footer_consult_desc: For personalized BaZi consultation, add the author's WeChat or LINE (paid service)
footer_consult_link: Or click here to learn more
footer_powered_by: Powered by BaZi Auto Chart System
consult_card_title: Found it accurate? Want to know more?
consult_card_desc: If the analysis matches your reality and you want deeper, more detailed personal consultation, add the author for one-on-one paid analysis.
consult_page_subtitle: One-on-one in-depth BaZi analysis and life guidance
consult_page_intro_desc: Free charting provides the basic framework, while one-on-one consultation offers more precise, personalized analysis tailored to your specific situation.
consult_feature1_desc: Analyze key information in your chart based on your specific questions
consult_feature2_desc: Comprehensive personalized advice on career, wealth, relationships, and health
consult_feature3_desc: Accurately predict important time nodes to help you seize key life opportunities
consult_scan_title: Scan QR code to add friend
no_own_bazi_hint: No BaZi set yet. Select one from your history.
wechat_tip_text: WeChat browser has limited features. Tap ··· at top right and select 'Open in Browser' for the best experience.
glossary_sizhu_desc: Year, Month, Day, and Hour pillars composed of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches
glossary_tiangan_desc: Jia, Yi, Bing, Ding, Wu, Ji, Geng, Xin, Ren, Gui - 10 in total
glossary_dizhi_desc: Zi, Chou, Yin, Mao, Chen, Si, Wu, Wei, Shen, You, Xu, Hai - 12 in total
glossary_wuxing_desc: Metal, Wood, Water, Fire, Earth - generating and overcoming cycles
glossary_shishen_desc: Bi Jian, Jie Cai, Shi Shen, Shang Guan, Pian Cai, Zheng Cai, Qi Sha, Zheng Guan, Pian Yin, Zheng Yin
glossary_yongshen_desc: The most beneficial Five Element in the destiny chart
glossary_shensha_desc: Symbolic stars like Tianyi Noble, Wen Chang, Peach Blossom, etc.
glossary_dayun_desc: 10-year luck cycles that influence life fortune
glossary_liunian_desc: Yearly fortune that combines with Da Yun for overall luck
glossary_qiyun_desc: The age when the first Da Yun period begins
glossary_rizhu_desc: The Heavenly Stem of the Day Pillar, representing the self
glossary_shenti_desc: Whether the Day Master is strong or weak based on supporting elements
liunian_intro: Annual fortune overview based on Da Yun and Liu Nian interaction analysis.
risk_advice_2: Pay attention to health and relationships
risk_advice_3: Best time to accumulate, not to take risks
name: Name

shishen_bijian_career: Suitable for independent entrepreneurship, self-employment, freelance, and other roles requiring autonomy. Also suitable for partnerships, but watch out for fair profit sharing.
shishen_bijian_wealth: Wealth fluctuates considerably. Friends may borrow money or partnerships may lead to losses. Learn to manage finances and say no.
shishen_bijian_relationship: Fairly independent in relationships; not overly dependent on partner. In marriage, give your partner space and avoid being too self-centered.
shishen_bijian_health: Generally good physical constitution, but avoid overexertion.
shishen_bijian_advice: Learn to cooperate and share; don't carry everything alone. Appropriately leverage others' help.
shishen_jiecai_career: Suitable for sales, public relations, entertainment, catering, and other industries requiring social skills and adventurous spirit.
shishen_jiecai_wealth: Rob Wealth brings spending and waste. Spends lavishly and is easily cheated financially. Strengthen financial awareness.
shishen_jiecai_relationship: Proactive in relationships but may neglect partner for friends. Balance social life and family.
shishen_jiecai_health: Rob Wealth brings consumption; avoid overtaxing your body.
shishen_jiecai_advice: Control impulsive spending, be cautious with friendships, and don't trust others' investment advice blindly.
shishen_shishen_career: Suitable for catering, food, performing arts, creative work, education, and other fields requiring talent and expressiveness.
shishen_shishen_wealth: Eating God brings food fortune and enjoyment. Wealth is generally stable; earn through talent.
shishen_shishen_relationship: Emotionally rich, good at expressing love; sweet married life.
shishen_shishen_health: Eating God brings enjoyment; watch out for overindulgence leading to weight gain.
shishen_shishen_advice: Showcase your talents and enjoy life, but don't become too complacent.
shishen_shangguan_career: Suitable for creative, design, performing arts, writing, consulting, and other fields requiring innovation and eloquence.
shishen_shangguan_wealth: Strong ability to generate wealth, but also spends lavishly. Learn to earn more and spend less.
shishen_shangguan_relationship: Picky in relationships; prone to arguments with partner.
shishen_shangguan_health: Hurting Officer brings consumption; avoid overusing your brain and voice.
shishen_shangguan_advice: Channel innovation and eloquence into the right path; don't be too flashy.
shishen_zhengcai_career: Suitable for accounting, banking, administration, finance, and other stable, practical industries.
shishen_zhengcai_wealth: Direct Wealth brings stable income; wealth is steady but won't bring sudden riches. Suited for long-term investment and savings.
shishen_zhengcai_relationship: Direct Wealth represents true love; stable and happy marriage. For males, Direct Wealth is the wife star.
shishen_zhengcai_health: Lives a regular life; generally good health.
shishen_zhengcai_advice: Maintain a diligent and practical attitude; steadily accumulate wealth.
shishen_piancai_career: Suitable for investment, trade, sales, public relations, entertainment, and other fields requiring social skills and judgment.
shishen_piancai_wealth: Indirect Wealth brings windfall gains; wealth fluctuates greatly. Good for investment and speculation, but watch the risks.
shishen_piancai_relationship: Popular with the opposite sex but may be unfaithful. Stay committed.
shishen_piancai_health: Indirect Wealth brings enjoyment; avoid excessive indulgence.
shishen_piancai_advice: Use your investment acumen wisely but control risk. Stay faithful in relationships.
shishen_zhengguan_career: Suitable for civil service, management, law, education, and other fields requiring authority and responsibility.
shishen_zhengguan_wealth: Direct Officer brings status and power; wealth is generally stable, earned through legitimate means.
shishen_zhengguan_relationship: Direct Officer represents true love; stable relationship. For females, Direct Officer is the husband star.
shishen_zhengguan_health: Lives a regular life; avoid overworking.
shishen_zhengguan_advice: Show leadership ability but stay flexible; don't be too rigid.
shishen_qisha_career: Suitable for military, law, sports, management, and other fields requiring boldness and decisiveness.
shishen_qisha_wealth: Seven Killings brings competition and pressure; wealth fluctuates greatly. Hard work required to gain wealth.
shishen_qisha_relationship: Tends to be dominant in relationships; may conflict with partner.
shishen_qisha_health: Seven Killings brings pressure and accidents; pay attention to safety and mental health.
shishen_qisha_advice: Turn pressure into motivation, but watch your temper and stay safe.
shishen_zhengyin_career: Suitable for education, culture, religion, charity, counseling, and other fields requiring compassion and cultivation.
shishen_zhengyin_wealth: Direct Resource brings noble help and education; wealth is generally stable, earned through knowledge and benefactors.
shishen_zhengyin_relationship: Gentle in relationships; stable marriage. Tolerant toward partner.
shishen_zhengyin_advice: Keep learning and improving; make good use of benefactor luck; show compassion and tolerance.
shishen_pianyin_career: Suitable for research, divination, traditional medicine, counseling, art creation, and other fields requiring unique thinking.
shishen_pianyin_wealth: Indirect Resource brings unconventional income; wealth is unstable. Earn through unique skills.
shishen_pianyin_relationship: Passive in relationships; prone to loneliness.
shishen_pianyin_health: Indirect Resource brings solitude; pay attention to mental health and socialize more.
shishen_pianyin_advice: Leverage your unique thinking, but integrate into society; don't isolate yourself.
pdf_footer_disclaimer: This report is auto-generated by BaZi Chart System, for cultural research reference only.
pdf_footer_note: BaZi analysis is traditional culture, not a basis for real-life decisions.
compat_analysis_same_element: Both day masters are {element}, with similar personalities and easy understanding.
compat_analysis_gen1: Person 1 is {elem1}, Person 2 is {elem2}. {elem1} generates {elem2}, naturally nurturing and helping.
compat_analysis_gen2: Person 1 is {elem1}, Person 2 is {elem2}. {elem2} generates {elem1}, naturally supporting.
compat_analysis_overcome1: Person 1 is {elem1}, Person 2 is {elem2}. {elem1} overcomes {elem2}, may cause pressure.
compat_analysis_overcome2: Person 1 is {elem1}, Person 2 is {elem2}. {elem2} overcomes {elem1}, may cause pressure.
compat_analysis_weak_elements: Both lack {elements} element(s), consider supplementing in daily life.
compat_analysis_overall_good: Overall, the two charts complement each other well and get along harmoniously.
compat_analysis_overall_neutral: Overall, mutual understanding and tolerance are needed.
compat_analysis_overall_bad: Overall, more patience and wisdom are needed to get along.
compat_advice_excellent: Made in heaven! {elem1} and {elem2} complement perfectly. Cherish each other and grow together.
compat_advice_good: {elem1} and {elem2} complement each other well. Communicate more and understanding will grow.
compat_advice_neutral: {elem1} and {elem2} are stable together. Create romance and surprises proactively.
compat_advice_challenging: {elem1} and {elem2} need adjustment. Learn to think from each other's perspective.
compat_advice_difficult: {elem1} and {elem2} face challenges. Great patience and wisdom are needed.
error_rate_limit: Too many requests, please try again later
liunian_career_same: Career pressure intensifies; you may take on more responsibilities. Stay steady and avoid frequent changes.
liunian_career_sheng: Room for growth in career; seize opportunities and showcase your abilities.
liunian_career_ke: External constraints or challenges may arise; pay attention to relationships and rules.
liunian_career_other: Career fortune is relatively stable; focus on gaining experience rather than aggressive moves.
liunian_wealth_be_ke: Wealth fluctuates significantly; expenses may increase. Focus on risk control.
liunian_wealth_sheng: Opportunities for wealth growth; suitable for steady income accumulation, but spend within means.
liunian_wealth_other: Wealth is generally stable; avoid high-risk investments.
liunian_relationship_same: Relationship matters become a focus; avoid emotional communication.
liunian_relationship_sheng: Interpersonal relationships flow smoothly; helpful for enhancing feelings and cooperation.
liunian_relationship_other: Relationships are relatively stable; focus on maintaining balance.
liunian_health_ke: Health requires attention to fatigue and stress; maintaining regular routines is essential.
liunian_health_same: Energy consumption is high; pay attention to rest and body recovery.
liunian_health_other: Overall health is stable; maintain daily self-care.
liunian_quad_career_good: Career has momentum; suitable for actively pursuing opportunities.
liunian_quad_career_attention: Maintain stability at work; avoid conflicts with authority.
liunian_quad_career_normal: Career pace is relatively steady; focus on execution.
liunian_quad_wealth_low: Room for financial improvement, but avoid aggressive investing.
liunian_quad_wealth_other: Financial fluctuations are noticeable; conservative strategy recommended.
liunian_quad_love_ke: Differences in relationships may arise; communication is especially important.
liunian_quad_love_normal: Emotional state is relatively stable; suitable for deepening relationships.
liunian_quad_health_high: Pay attention to rest and stress management; avoid overexertion.
liunian_quad_health_normal: Health is generally stable; maintain regular habits.
dayun_tone_0: This decade is like shifting gears: external pace accelerates, and you'll be pushed to make decisions.
dayun_tone_1: This decade is like polishing: not necessarily dramatic, but it strengthens your foundation.
dayun_tone_2: This decade is like harvest: what you planted earlier will bear results during this period.
dayun_theme_weak: This luck cycle supplements your weakest element, meaning you'll start solving old problems in new ways.
dayun_theme_strong: This luck cycle amplifies your strongest element; opportunities concentrate, but overexertion is a risk.
dayun_theme_other: This luck cycle brings new energy that makes certain areas flow more smoothly.
dayun_keywords_mid: Career formation, Resource integration, Network filtering
dayun_keywords_late: Position & responsibility, Long-term assets, Lifestyle solidification
dayun_hook: Reflect on whether this period included: significant job changes, major partnership shifts, relocation/school/job transfers, or sudden increase in family responsibilities.
dayun_advice: Recommended approach: Break big goals into three actionable items (skills, relationships, cash flow).
event_career_guansha: Career pressure increases, but opportunities for responsibility, exams, and promotion arise
event_career_food: Expression drive strengthens; suitable for output, creativity, and skill improvement
event_career_bijian: Competition intensifies; friction with colleagues is likely
event_career_default: Career changes are minimal; focus on accumulation
event_wealth_cai: Earning opportunities exist but come with risks; make rational decisions
event_wealth_bijian: Risk of financial loss increases; watch out for lending and social spending
event_wealth_default: Wealth is stable; focus on planning
event_relationship_bijian: Emotions are expressed outwardly; disputes may arise; pay attention to communication
event_relationship_guansha: Relationships lean rational; practical issues may create distance
event_health_imbalance: Five-element imbalance; pay attention to corresponding organs and routines
event_health_default: Overall condition is acceptable; maintain regular habits
history_reason_career_change: Clear career change signal in that year
history_reason_relationship_conflict: Interpersonal/relationship conflict information in that year
history_reason_health_imbalance: Significant health five-element imbalance in that year
history_reason_study_tendency: Learning and accumulation tendency in that year
history_reason_yongshen_unsupported: Liunian does not support Yongshen; events may require adaptation
history_reason_body_weak: Day master is weak; more likely to experience events during volatile years
dayun_tpl_help_0: This luck pillar has strong noble person luck. Take initiative, meet new circles, start new projects. Once you take the step, opportunities will come to you.
dayun_tpl_help_1: Overall momentum is upward. Resources and connections are drawn to you. Good for changing tracks, further education, or moving to a bigger platform.
dayun_tpl_help_2: Good time to use what you've accumulated. Leverage noble persons and platforms to pursue titles, certifications, or promotions.
dayun_tpl_self_0: Self-awareness strengthens during this period. You'll want to live on your own terms. Good for establishing personal style, IP, or career direction, but don't burn all bridges.
dayun_tpl_self_1: You may feel an impulse to 'try just once.' Good for starting businesses, side projects, or changing majors, but always keep a safety cushion.
dayun_tpl_self_2: You may form your own value system, creating some tension with family or environment. Learn to balance persistence and compromise.
dayun_tpl_attack_0: This is a highly competitive luck pillar. You may face exams, promotions, performance targets, or workplace politics. Good for pushing forward, but use strategy rather than brute force.
dayun_tpl_attack_1: External environment will force you to grow. Possible job changes, city moves, or circle changes. Use this time to develop negotiation skills and boundaries.
dayun_tpl_attack_2: Good time to actively pursue positions, especially in management, frontline business, or performance-oriented roles.
dayun_tpl_drain_0: This period is more like a 'charging phase.' Effort may exceed immediate returns. Good for studying, practicing, building portfolios—invest in things that accumulate value.
dayun_tpl_drain_1: Life pace may feel hectic, easy to multitask. Learn to prioritize; trying to handle everything will drain you physically and mentally.
dayun_tpl_drain_2: Good for quietly building foundations: reading, certifications, skills, fitness. Short-term results may not show, but will manifest in the next 1-2 luck pillars.
dayun_tpl_stress_0: Responsibility will be forcefully increased. You may need to care for family, bear financial pressure, or face long-term work stress. Stay steady, don't gamble recklessly.
dayun_tpl_stress_1: This period may feel dragged by reality. When inner pressure builds, exercise regularly, talk to someone, avoid letting emotions accumulate into physical problems.
dayun_tpl_stress_2: Rules and systems become more prominent. Learn to play within the system—understand processes, reporting, and how to protect yourself.
dayun_tpl_neutral_0: Overall relatively stable without extreme ups and downs. Good for gradually organizing life structure: money, relationships, time, health—all get fine-tuned.
dayun_tpl_neutral_1: You can set a more comfortable pace, leave room for hobbies, and see if new possibilities emerge.
dayun_tpl_neutral_2: Good for long-term but not urgent things: learning a new language, skill, or instrument, or developing habits that truly benefit you.
dayun_event_hint_childhood: Mostly corresponds to family environment, parents' work changes, moving, school transitions—greatly affects your growth atmosphere.
dayun_event_hint_student: Mainly reflects in academics, peer circles, interpersonal relationships, and early romantic experiences.
dayun_event_hint_early_career: Mostly related to job hunting, internships, entering society, first job change, or independent living.
dayun_event_hint_career_dev: Career direction adjustments, income structure changes, and key choices about settling down are common.
dayun_event_hint_midlife: Common themes include family responsibilities, property, children's education, and career repositioning.
dayun_event_hint_mature: More reflected in health, quality of life, family atmosphere, and inner state adjustments.
liunian_tpl_help_0: Strong interpersonal support. Noble persons, teachers, bosses, or clients are helpful. Good for proposing your ideas.
liunian_tpl_help_1: Good for starting new plans: changing majors, teams, jobs, moving, studying abroad—you'll easily find people willing to help.
liunian_tpl_help_2: Overall atmosphere is smooth. Things that were stuck may suddenly have breakthroughs. Try more.
liunian_tpl_self_0: Strong self-will this year. You'll especially care about 'what I truly want.' Good for making life direction decisions.
liunian_tpl_self_1: You prefer your own pace and don't like being arranged. Be gentler in communication with family and colleagues.
liunian_tpl_self_2: Personal expression may surge: wanting to create content, speak up, change image. A good year to reshape your personal brand.
liunian_tpl_attack_0: Competition and confrontation feel heavy. May encounter exams, promotions, performance pressure, or relationship conflicts.
liunian_tpl_attack_1: Use strategy over emotion. Good for improving negotiation, expression, and boundary-setting. Learn to say 'no.'
liunian_tpl_attack_2: A good year to fight for what you want, and also to recognize what's not worth continuing. Making reductions is important.
liunian_tpl_drain_0: Busy and rushed, many things to do, time feels insufficient. Focus energy on the 2-3 most important things.
liunian_tpl_drain_1: Study, certifications, projects, family care—draining tasks are numerous. Don't over-schedule yourself.
liunian_tpl_drain_2: Good for quietly honing skills or works. Tiring in the short term, but crucial for the next 1-2 years.
liunian_tpl_stress_0: Responsibility and pressure feel heavy. Reality pushes you along: money, health, family, contracts all need attention.
liunian_tpl_stress_1: If your body starts sending signals (insomnia, anxiety, binge eating), take it seriously. Seek professional help if needed.
liunian_tpl_stress_2: High external demands this year. Good for solidifying foundations and controlling risk. Not ideal for big gambling decisions.
liunian_tpl_neutral_0: Overall stable, life proceeds step by step. Good for repairing relationships, tidying up, and giving yourself breathing room.
liunian_tpl_neutral_1: Can be used to try new interests, develop side project prototypes. Less rigid assessment, making it easier to experiment with new directions.
liunian_tpl_neutral_2: Good for annual review: see which habits are worth keeping, which people and things can slowly be let go.
liunian_event_hint_child: Themes mostly relate to studying, exams, peers, social circles, hobby classes, moving, or parents' work changes.
liunian_event_hint_youth: Mostly related to further education, job hunting, internships, entering society, social expansion, early romantic experiences.
liunian_event_hint_adult: May encounter job changes, raises, direction changes, cohabitation, or marriage—key life choices.
liunian_event_hint_middle: Common topics include career stability, family structure, children, property, and medium-term planning.
liunian_event_hint_senior: Mostly about asset allocation, health management, children's development, and caring for aging parents.
liunian_event_hint_elderly: Quality of life, physical condition, and mental well-being become more important. Good to slow down the pace.

comp_events_help_1: Good for starting new projects or trying new things
comp_events_help_2: Smooth interpersonal relationships, easy to get support
comp_events_self_0: May have an important moment of personal growth
comp_events_self_1: Good for establishing your goals and direction
comp_events_self_2: May encounter some challenges but can overcome them
comp_events_drain_0: May feel busy with many things to do
comp_events_drain_1: Good for learning new skills to prepare for the future
comp_events_drain_2: Patience needed; results will slowly emerge
comp_events_stress_0: May encounter some pressure or difficulties
comp_events_stress_1: Need to maintain a positive mindset
comp_events_stress_2: Good to stay steady, don't be impulsive
comp_events_neutral_0: Life proceeds step by step without major fluctuations
comp_watch_help_0: Even with good fortune, don't be overconfident
comp_watch_help_1: Cherish those who help you; don't burn bridges
comp_watch_self_0: Don't be too stubborn; learn to listen to others
comp_watch_self_1: Keep an open mind and accept different opinions
comp_watch_self_2: Pay attention to communication with family and friends
comp_watch_drain_0: Don't neglect health because of being busy
comp_watch_drain_1: Learn to prioritize; don't try to do everything
comp_watch_drain_2: Stay patient; don't rush for results
comp_watch_attack_0: Pay attention to handling interpersonal relationships
comp_watch_stress_0: Pay attention to physical health; get regular checkups
comp_watch_stress_1: Don't put too much pressure on yourself
comp_watch_stress_2: Learn to release stress and maintain a pleasant mood
comp_watch_neutral_1: Don't become complacent because things are uneventful
comp_action_help_1: Expand your network and make new friends
comp_action_help_2: Try new things and challenge yourself
comp_action_self_1: Stay true to yourself; don't follow the crowd
comp_action_drain_0: Learn new skills to prepare for the future
comp_action_drain_2: Manage your time well and improve efficiency
comp_action_attack_2: Stay calm and make rational decisions
star_tianyi_desc: Often receives help from noble persons throughout life. Someone will lend a hand at critical moments.
star_tianyi_hint: Don't struggle alone. Seeking help externally actually leads to smoother outcomes.
star_wenchang_desc: Strong learning ability, good comprehension, suitable for deep thinking work.
star_wenchang_hint: Reading, exams, research, and writing are all beneficial for you.
yongshen_msg_insufficient_data: Insufficient historical events to refine Yongshen
yongshen_msg_not_needed: Current Yongshen explanatory power is adequate; no refinement needed
yongshen_msg_no_pattern: Event types are scattered; no refinement recommended at this time
yongshen_msg_no_change: Suggested refinement matches original Yongshen; no adjustment needed
yongshen_reason_consumption: High-response periods concentrated in drain aspect. Consider choosing a support element from favorable gods as new Yongshen candidate
yongshen_reason_career_blocked: Career repeatedly blocked. Overly strong element may be unchecked. Consider using its controlling element as Yongshen candidate
yongshen_note: This is a system suggestion; manual judgment is needed to confirm
wx_analysis_strong_wood: Wood is strongest in the chart. Personality leans toward growth, innovation, and expression.
wx_analysis_strong_fire: Fire is strongest in the chart. Personality leans toward passion, performance, and socializing.
wx_analysis_strong_earth: Earth is strongest in the chart. Personality leans toward stability, pragmatism, and tolerance.
wx_analysis_strong_metal: Metal is strongest in the chart. Personality leans toward decisiveness, principles, and execution.
wx_analysis_strong_water: Water is strongest in the chart. Personality leans toward flexibility, wisdom, and communication.
wx_analysis_weak_wood: Wood is weak. Growth and creativity need supplementation.
wx_analysis_weak_fire: Fire is weak. Expression and passion need supplementation.
wx_analysis_weak_earth: Earth is weak. Stability and groundedness need supplementation.
wx_analysis_weak_metal: Metal is weak. Decisiveness and principles need supplementation.
wx_analysis_weak_water: Water is weak. Flexibility and wisdom need supplementation.
wx_analysis_imbalanced: Five elements are somewhat imbalanced; adjustment is needed.
wx_advice_supplement_wood: Supplement Wood: spend time in nature, learn new things, cultivate creativity.
wx_advice_supplement_fire: Supplement Fire: engage in social activities, express yourself, maintain enthusiasm.
wx_advice_supplement_earth: Supplement Earth: stay grounded, cultivate patience, focus on practical matters.
wx_advice_supplement_metal: Supplement Metal: strengthen principles, improve execution.
wx_advice_supplement_water: Supplement Water: keep learning, adapt flexibly, strengthen communication.
wx_advice_overstrong_wood: Wood is overstrong. Avoid being too stubborn; loosen control.
wx_advice_overstrong_fire: Fire is overstrong. Avoid being too impulsive; stay calm.
wx_advice_overstrong_earth: Earth is overstrong. Avoid being too conservative; embrace innovation.
wx_advice_overstrong_metal: Metal is overstrong. Avoid being too harsh; show more tolerance.
wx_advice_overstrong_water: Water is overstrong. Avoid being too changeable; stay focused.
wx_advice_balanced: Five elements are balanced. Maintain the current state.
